command: rg -n "deploy|ACA|Azure Container|healthz|readiness|az containerapp|revision|smoke" docs deploy.sh package.json README.md .github 2>/dev/null

package.json:29:    "verify:phase81:smoke": "bun scripts/phase81-slack-write-smoke.ts",
deploy.sh:5:# kodiai -- Azure Container Apps Deployment Script
deploy.sh:7:# This script provisions all Azure resources and deploys the kodiai container.
deploy.sh:22:#                                rotating Claude login token, not the deploy

d

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import os, shutil
required=['GITHUB_APP_ID','GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64','GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET','CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN','VOYAGE_API_KEY','SLACK_BOT_TOKEN','SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET','SLACK_BOT_USER_ID','SLACK_KODIAI_CHANNEL_ID','DATABASE_URL']
print('az_cli=' + ('present' if shutil.which('az') else 'missing'))
print('curl=' + ('present' if shutil.which('curl') else 'missing'))
print('missing_env=' + ','.join([k for k in required if not os.environ.get(k)]) )
print('env_file=' + ('present' if os.path.exists('.env') else 'missing'))
PY
az account show --query '{name:name, tenantId:tenantId, user:user.name}' -o json 2>/dev/null || echo 'az_account=unavailable'

set -euo pipefail
ACTIVE_REVISION=$(az containerapp revision list --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query '[?properties.active && properties.trafficWeight > `0`] | sort_by(@, &properties.createdTime) | [-1].name' --output tsv)
FQDN=$(az containerapp show --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query properties.configuration.ingress.fqdn --output tsv)
HEALTH_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/kodiai-healthz.json -w '%{http_code}' "https://${FQDN}/healthz")
READINESS_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/kodiai-readiness.json -w '%{http_code}' "https://${FQDN}/readiness")
printf 'active_revision=%s\n' "$ACTIVE_REVISION"
printf 'fqdn=%s\n' "$FQDN"
printf 'healthz_status=%s\n' "$HEALTH_STATUS"
printf 'readiness_status=%s\n' "$READINESS_STATUS"
printf 'healthz_body='; python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
print(Path('/tmp/kodiai-healthz.json').read_text()[:500])
PY
printf 'readiness_body='; python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
print(Path('/tmp/kodiai-readiness.json').read_text()[:500])
PY

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = r'''set -euo pipefail
ACTIVE_REVISION=$(az containerapp revision list --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query '[?properties.active && properties.trafficWeight > `0`] | sort_by(@, &properties.createdTime) | [-1].name' --output tsv)
FQDN=$(az containerapp show --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query properties.configuration.ingress.fqdn --output tsv)
HEALTH_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/kodiai-healthz.verify.json -w '%{http_code}' "https://${FQDN}/healthz")
READINESS_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/kodiai-readiness.verify.json -w '%{http_code}' "https://${FQDN}/readiness")
test "$ACTIVE_REVISION" = "ca-kodiai--deploy-20260504-222417"
test "$HEALTH_STATUS" = "200"
test "$READINESS_STATUS" = "200"
printf 'active_revision=%s\nhealthz_status=%s\nreadiness_status=%s\n' "$ACTIVE_REVISION" "$HEALTH_STATUS" "$READINESS_STATUS"
'''
start=time.perf_counter()
proc=subprocess.run(['bash','-lc',cmd], text=True, capture_output=True)
dur=int((time.perf_counter()-start)*1000)
print(proc.stdout, end='')
if proc.stderr:
    print(proc.stderr, end='', file=__import__('sys').stderr)
print(f'duration_ms={dur}')
raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)
PY

healthz_status=200

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('docs/smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions.md')
text=p.read_text()
required=['ca-kodiai--deploy-20260504-222417','/healthz` | HTTP 200','/readiness` | HTTP 200','T05 should post a fresh trigger']
missing=[s for s in required if s not in text]
print('smoke_artifact=' + ('ok' if not missing else 'missing:' + ','.join(missing)))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, pathlib, sys
cmd = r'''set -euo pipefail
ACTIVE_REVISION=$(az containerapp revision list --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query '[?properties.active && properties.trafficWeight > `0`] | sort_by(@, &properties.createdTime) | [-1].name' --output tsv)
FQDN=$(az containerapp show --name ca-kodiai --resource-group rg-kodiai --query properties.configuration.ingress.fqdn --output tsv)
HEALTH_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/kodiai-healthz.final.json -w '%{http_code}' "https://${FQDN}/healthz")
READINESS_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/kodiai-readiness.final.json -w '%{http_code}' "https://${FQDN}/readiness")
test "$ACTIVE_REVISION" = "ca-kodiai--deploy-20260504-222417"
test "$HEALTH_STATUS" = "200"
test "$READINESS_STATUS" = "200"
printf 'active_revision=%s\nhealthz_status=%s\nreadiness_status=%s\n' "$ACTIVE_REVISION" "$HEALTH_STATUS" "$READINESS_STATUS"
'''
start=time.perf_counter()
proc=subprocess.run(['bash','-lc',cmd], text=True, capture_output=True)
dur=int((time.perf_counter()-start)*1000)
print(proc.stdout, end='')
if proc.stderr:
    print(proc.stderr, end='', file=sys.stderr)
text=pathlib.Path('docs/smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions.md').read_text()
required=['ca-kodiai--deploy-20260504-222417','T05 should post a fresh trigger','/healthz` | HTTP 200','/readiness` | HTTP 200']
missing=[s for s in required if s not in text]
print('smoke_artifact=' + ('ok' if not missing else 'missing:' + ','.join(missing)))
print(f'duration_ms={dur}')
raise SystemExit(proc.returncode or (1 if missing else 0))
PY
